Interface IBaseNetworkTopology

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a base network topology.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("7054DC68-1A23-4A3D-92AB-AF90F1C7B426")]
public interface IBaseNetworkTopology

Properties

DirtyArea[IPolygon]

Returns the dirty area polygon of the utility network.

IPolygon DirtyArea[IPolygon Location] { get; }

Parameters

Location IPolygon

Property Value

IPolygon

HasValidNetworkTopology()

Indicates if the network has a valid network topology.

NetworkTopologyUpdateInfo(esriIndexUpdateInfo, out double, out int)

Returns the network topology update info.

indexUpdateInfo esriIndexUpdateInfo

ValidateNetworkTopology(IEnvelope, bool, out double, out bool, out int, out bool)

Extent IEnvelope
asynchronous bool
TimeStamp double
HasErrors bool
